title: Solar-Farm Inverter Clearance Packing Around Fixed Keep-Outs
strategies: coarse row-major grid of small equal-ish clearance circles, each shrunk for walls and keep-out obstacles (reproduces the checker baseline B)
fixed grid centres with sequential radius growth to touch walls, obstacles, and previously fixed circles
largest-empty-circle greedy with unequal radii on a fine candidate lattice plus local recentering of each accepted circle
ensemble that fills open pockets first with big circles then packs the remaining slack, respecting every fixed keep-out
